expectations.text: Exactly 8 walls are defined (T-shape uses 8 per the skill's wall count table)
expectations.evidence: Table lists walls 1–8 with all fields

expectations.text: All coordinates are in inches (40 ft = 480 in, 20 ft = 240 in, 24 ft = 288 in, 5.5 in depth)
expectations.evidence: 480, 240, 288, 5.5 all present as inch values; conversion table shown

expectations.text: Corner overlap extensions accounted for: sheathing/drywall extensions offset by wall depth (5.5 in) at shared corners
expectations.evidence: start_y values for horizontal walls use 234.5 (240 - 5.5) and vertical walls use 5.5 as start_y offset — correct corner insets

expectations.text: ext_dir values are correctly assigned (+1 or -1) based on which side of each wall faces the exterior
expectations.evidence: Wall 1 (front) ext_dir=-1, Wall 2 (right) ext_dir=+1, Wall 8 (stem bottom) ext_dir=+1 — all consistent with exterior-facing direction

expectations.text: Dormer cut range calculated from center of top bar (240 in from left) ± half dormer width, with affected truss indices identified
expectations.evidence: Center=240in, dormer 72in wide → X=204–276. Trusses at 24in OC: indices 9 (216), 10 (240), 11 (264) identified

expectations.text: T-junction walls (where stem meets top bar) correctly handled — interior/exterior flags set appropriately
expectations.evidence: Walls 6 and 7 (stem sides) correctly start at y=234.5 (at rear of top bar), all marked exterior. T-junction note included.
